features.name: user_safety
features.description: Could the action cause harm to the user or others?

features.name: accuracy
features.description: Is the action likely to produce correct results?

features.name: privacy
features.description: Could the action expose private or sensitive information?

features.name: scope
features.description: Does the action stay within the intended scope of the request?

features.name: reversibility
features.description: Can the action be undone if it turns out to be wrong?
